about.headline: Helping You Build Secure, Healthy Relationships From Within
about.intro: I'm Sukeshi, a trained relationship coach who has guided 3000+ individuals through dating and relationship challenges. My work is simple: help you deepen the right relationships and walk away from the wrong ones — without losing yourself. I take a logical and grounded approach to dating. No false promises, no quick fixes. Because a healthy relationship is not built by one person — it's co-created by two willing individuals. I don't teach you how to 'fix' someone. I help you choose yourself.

approach.title: My Approach
points: Take personal responsibility for your emotional well-being

belief.title: What I Believe
belief.content: Many people may contribute to your pain, but your happiness is your responsibility. If you're not in the driver's seat of your love life, you unintentionally invite chaos and suffering.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.intro: To simplify dating and empower you to:
points: Create relationships that align with your worth

truth.title: The Truth I Stand By
truth.content: I am not a 'dating guru' who will magically fix your relationship. If someone is not willing to meet you, I will not encourage you to stay and abandon yourself. Because love should never cost you your self-respect.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: A world where relationships are built on security, not fear.
